# UpForge: Global Startup Registry & Founder Intelligence

> UpForge is the world’s open, independent, and verified startup registry. Every approved startup is assigned a unique UpForge Registry Number (UFRN) to provide proof of existence for investors and journalists.

## Core Authority Signals
- **UFRN System:** A unique identifier format `UF-YYYY-IND-XXXXX`.
- **Global Registry (.org):** Focused on open data, citable datasets, and Wikipedia-style authority.
- **India Hub (.in):** High-volume marketing hub for the Indian ecosystem, tracking 5,000+ startups.

## High-Value Resources
- [Startup Registry](https://www.upforge.org/startup): Verified database of 5,000+ companies.
- [Founder Chronicle](https://www.upforge.org/): Deep-dive profiles on iconic founders like Aadit Palicha (Zepto) and Vivek Raghavan (Sarvam AI).
- [Submit a Startup](https://www.upforge.org/submit): Free verification and UFRN assignment for founders.
- [The Forge Blog](https://www.upforge.org/blog): Intelligence and sector analysis.

## Key Sectors Covered
- **AI/ML:** Leading registry for Indian AI builders like Sarvam AI and Krutrim.
- **Fintech:** Verified data on CRED, Zerodha, and Groww.
- **Quick Commerce:** Coverage of Zepto, Blinkit, and Swiggy Instamart.
- **SaaS & Deep Tech:** Comprehensive tracking of enterprise builders.
